free_text: 1.5 to 3.0 MeV for titanium, iron and bismuth nuclei
In INDC(CCP)-171 - only title and first author.
EG-5. Pulse duration < 1.5 nsec, frequency 4 MHz,
Solid Ti-T targets on W backing of 0.1 mm
Cylinders placed at 10 cm distance from neutron source.
Polyethylene CH(2) , mass 1.60 g, height 5.00 cm,
outer diameter 0.88 cm, inner diameter 0.57 cm,
Stilbene crystal of 4 x 3 cm or 5 x 5 cm
Energy dependence of spectrometer efficiency was
determined by neutron scattering on hydrogen
(polyethylene) and by known cross-section of T(p,n)He3
Corrections were introduced on neutron flux
attenuation in sample ,multiple scattering of neutrons
in sample,angular resolution and anisotropy of neutron
Full errors of cross sections which include
errors of neutron scattering cross sections of oxygen
errors of normalization relative to neutron-proton
other errors, connected with procedure of cross section
REACTION code SF5 in several SAN corrected.
M.M. Correction according to current rules
ERR-T -> DATA-ERR (no values of partial errors).
TITLE was corrected as given in INDC(CCP)-171.
